title: n1qn1 optimization — n1qn1
code: n1qn1(   call_eval,   call_grad,   vars,   environment = parent.frame(1),   ...,   epsilon = .Machine$double.eps,   max_iterations = 100,   nsim = 100,   imp = 0,   invisible = NULL,   zm = NULL,   restart = FALSE,   assign = FALSE,   print.functions = FALSE )

title: n1qn1 optimization — n1qn1
text: call_eval Objective function call_grad Gradient Function vars Initial starting point line search environment Environment call_eval/call_grad evaluated. ... Ignored additional parameters. epsilon Precision estimate max_iterations Number iterations nsim Number function evaluations imp Verbosity messages. invisible boolean control output minimizer suppressed. zm Prior Hessian (compressed format; format output c.hess). restart estimation restart? assign Assign hessian c.hess environment environment? (Default FALSE) print.functions Boolean control function value parameter estimates echoed every time function called.

title: n1qn1 optimization — n1qn1
text: return value list following elements: value value minimized function. par parameter value minimized function. H estimated Hessian final parameter estimate. c.hess Compressed Hessian saving curvature. n.fn Number function evaluations n.gr Number gradient evaluations

title: n1qn1 optimization — n1qn1
text: C. Lemarechal, Stephen L. Campbell, Jean-Philippe     Chancelier, Ramine Nikoukhah, Wenping Wang & Matthew L. Fidler

title: n1qn1 6.0.1-14
text: requested CRAN, gcc-asan valgrind Make package thread-safe: convert global state thread_local, remove static local variables Fortran-translated C code, add integer overflow guards, fix memory leaks R callback wrappers. Review C integer types; confirmed existing types correct given Fortran ABI constraints (int* required Fortran INTEGER) R’s INTEGER() returning int*. Fix undefined behavior: add virtual destructor EvalBase deleting derived callback objects base pointer well-defined. Fix memory leak: validate n nzm allocating callback objects, preventing leak Rf_error called bad inputs. Fix restart=TRUE: typo caused mode remain 2 instead set 3. Fix assign=TRUE: wrong field name meant compressed Hessian never stored supplied environment. Add tests restart, assign, single-variable optimization, repeated calls, input error conditions.

Review C integer types; confirmed existing types correct given Fortran ABI constraints (int* required Fortran INTEGER) R’s INTEGER() returning int*.
